caption: A man wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt is seated at a keyboard in a studio setting with dark purple curtains in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a trumpet stands upright, and a guitar is leaned against the wall behind him. A studio monitor and small plush toys are also visible in the background. As the sequence progresses, the man plays the keyboard, shifting his hand positions across the white and black keys. His facial expression remains focused, and he occasionally leans closer to the microphone. The camera angle provides a view of both the man from the waist up and a close-up of his hands operating the keyboard. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
